title: Carnival Cuisine
description: Adds some carnival food and drinks to enjoy for Modfest: Carnival!
body:
[![Made for ModFest: Carnival](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModFest/art/v2/badge/svg/carnival/cozy.svg)](https://modfest.net/carnival)
[![Featured in BlanketCon '25](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/worldwidepixel/badges/642d312b71811b9d2696b562f735b07288844c71/bc25/featured_in/cozy.svg)](https://modfest.net/bc25)

Carnival Cuisine is a mod that adds some carnival food and drinks, such as a nice lemonade and hot dogs with fries. 

##  Food
* Hot Dog
* Hamburger
* French Fries
* Ice Cream
* Popcorn

## Drinks
* Lemonade
* Soda

Meals can be served on trays to take away from the main stand to enjoy anywhere.

These are all available to enjoy for Modfest: Carnival!
